steps.title: Identify the explicitly stated fact
steps.content: The passage explicitly states that the Hispanic Society “has more than 18,000 objects in its museum collection.”

steps.title: Match the fact to the answer
steps.content:
The correct response directly states that the collection contains over 18,000 objects—exactly what the passage says.

The other choices contradict the passage (current NYC location and 1904 founding date, respectively), while another response claims information about comparative visitor numbers that the passage never provides.

That confirms A is correct.
